{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Senator Pegarthus
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Senator Pegarthus]] is a senator.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c27">''The Knight'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Senator Pegarthus]] is a Senator of the planet [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c29">''The Knight'', chapter 29</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
